edge_record_schema.source_id: string — NODE-NNNN of the source node
edge_record_schema.target_id: string — NODE-NNNN of the target node

contains_rule: A CONTAINS edge is emitted from parent_dir → child (file or directory) when the parent path exists in path_to_node. Root-level files with no directory ancestor (parent = '.' or '') are not connected.

imports_rule.resolution: module.path → [module/path.py, module/path/__init__.py]; both candidates checked against path_to_node
imports_rule.relative_imports: Leading dots stripped — relative context is NOT preserved; relative imports will not resolve to correct paths in src/ layout projects
imports_rule.self_loop_guard: Edges where source_id == target_id are discarded
imports_rule.duplicate_guard: At most one IMPORTS edge per (importer, imported_module_path) pair

fastapi_example.imports_count_explanation: FastAPI source uses src/ layout and relative imports — neither pattern resolves to known node paths under static regex. Zero is correct and deterministic.

orchestrator_compatibility.check_by_orchestrator: existence only — run_client_pipeline.py Phase 3 checks os.path.exists(topo_log_path)
orchestrator_compatibility.no_field_reads: Orchestrator does not read any fields from 40.3
